member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Constants
member.summary: Constants used by the translation flow elements.

member.summary: Element key used by the .

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Constants.CountryNamesTranslatedKey
member.summary: Element key used by the .

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.CountriesTranslationData
member.summary: Concrete implementation of .

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.CountryCodeTranslationData
member.summary: Concrete implementation of .

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.ICountriesTranslationData
member.summary: Contains trawnslated country names for both the geographical and population weighted lists from .

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.ICountriesTranslationData.CountryNamesGeographicalTranslated
member.summary: Translated list of country names based on the geographical weighted list from IP Intelligence. This is translated to the browser language determined from the evidence.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.ICountriesTranslationData.CountryNamesPopulationTranslated
member.summary: Translated list of country names based on the population weighted list from IP Intelligence. This is translated to the browser language determined from the evidence.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.ICountryCodeTranslationData
member.summary: Contains English country names translated from country codes for both the geographical and population weighted lists from IP Intelligence.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.ICountryCodeTranslationData.CountryNamesGeographical
member.summary: List of country names based on the geographical weighted list of country codes from IP Intelligence.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Data.ICountryCodeTranslationData.CountryNamesPopulation
member.summary: List of country names based on the population weighted list of country codes from IP Intelligence.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountriesTranslationEngine
member.summary:
Engine which takes the country name properties from and translates them into the browser language determined from the evidence. Results are stored using the key.
All translation files are stored as embedded resources, so no configuration is required.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountriesTranslationEngine._translations
member.summary: Static translations passed to the base constructor.
Countructor which is only accessible by the builder.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountriesTranslationEngineBuilder
member.summary: Builder for the element. This requires no configuration, as all the configuration for the base translation engine is taken care of.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountriesTranslationEngineBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: Logger factory used by the engine and any element data created.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountriesTranslationEngineBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build a new instance of .
Creates an instance of .

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountryCodeTranslationEngine
member.summary:
Engine which takes the country code properties from IP Intelligence and translates them to country names. The country names are always in English. Results are stored using the key.
All translation files are stored as embedded resources, so no configuration is required.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountryCodeTranslationEngine._translations
member.summary: Static translations passed to the base constructor.
Countructor which is only accessible by the builder.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountryCodeTranslationEngineBuilder
member.summary: Builder for the element. This requires no configuration, as all the configuration for the base translation engine is taken care of.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountryCodeTranslationEngineBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: Logger factory used by the engine and any element data created.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.FlowElements.CountryCodeTranslationEngineBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build a new instance of .
Creates an instance of CountryCodeTranslationData

member.name: T:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Resources.Resources
member.summary: Internal resources class used to retrieve the translation files stored as embedded resources.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Resources.Resources.GetCountryResources
member.summary: Get the country name translation YAML files.
member.returns: Dictionary of file contents keyed on file name.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Resources.Resources.GetCountryCodeResources
member.summary: Get the country code translation YAML files.
member.returns: Dictionary of file contents keyed on file name.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.IpIntelligence.Translation.Resources.Resources.GetResources
member.summary: Get all the translation YAML files stored as embedded resources.
member.returns: Dictionary of file contents keyed on file name.
